brand.feature3: Play friends and climb the weekly leaderboard

login.lead: Pick up where you left off — your averages, live matches and training streak are waiting.
login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your details to access your dashboard.

register.lead: Join players tracking averages, checkouts and live matches — and training with structured drills built for real improvement.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start tracking your game in under a minute.
register.name: Full Name

forgot.lead: Enter your email and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and you'll receive a password reset link.
forgot.sent: A reset link will be sent if the account exists.
forgot.failed: We couldn't send this right now due to a technical issue. Please try again shortly.

reset.lead: Choose a new, secure password and get back to training.
reset.title: New password
reset.subtitle: Enter and confirm your new password.

verify.lead: Verify your email to unlock online matches, stats and friends.
verify.title: Verify your email
verify.subtitle: Click the link we just sent you. Didn't get it? Send another.
verify.sent: A new verification link has been sent to your email.
verify.failed: We couldn't send the verification email right now due to a technical issue. Please try again shortly.

confirm.lead: This is a secure area. Confirm your password to continue.
confirm.title: Confirm password
confirm.subtitle: Enter your password to continue.
